creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Merge the following ZFS patchsets from OpenSolaris:
1.) http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/patchlist-v1.txt
2.) http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/patchlist-arc.txt
3.) http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/patchlist-zil.txt

The v1 patch applies very cleanly and does need only minimal changes
(vdev_geom.c, vdev_file.c).

The arc patch for 9-CURRENT had to be adjusted due to modified arc.c.

Fix: 

All patches are under:
http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/

Combined patch for 9-CURRENT:
http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/head-zfs-combined.patch

Combined patch for 8-STABLE:
http://mfsbsd.vx.sk/zfs/stable-zfs-combined.patch
